backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend for a barcode/label printing system, handling print job submission, serial deduplication, label settings, user profiles, and access control via authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—USB printer auto-reconnect via localStorage and duplicate serial detection in ScanPrintTab—to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key behaviors of each component, store, service, and utility in the frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Make Some Double!! Barcode & Label Printing System' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in PasswordSessionProvider and ErrorBoundary, and triggers silent USB printer auto-reconnect via usePrinterStore when the session is unlocked.
frontend/src/audio/soundSystem.ts: Zustand-persisted sound settings store with Web Audio API beep generation, custom audio file playback, and a playSound function dispatching success, error, and printComplete sounds.
frontend/src/auth/passwordSession.ts: Utility module for creating, retrieving, validating, and clearing 8-hour password sessions stored in localStorage, with password validation against a configured expected password.
frontend/src/auth/PasswordSessionProvide: React context provider managing password session state, validating passwords on unlock, rehydrating sessions from localStorage on mount, and clearing invalid or expired sessions.
frontend/src/components/AppShell.tsx: Main application shell component that renders the header (with logo, backend status, device controls, and lock button), a four-tab navigation (Scan & Print, Label Settings, Devices, Diagnostics), and a footer.
frontend/src/components/BackendAvailabil: Displays a destructive badge when the backend is unavailable; renders nothing when the backend is reachable.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches unhandled render errors and shows a fallback UI with a page-refresh button.
frontend/src/components/HeaderDeviceCont: Header component showing printer connection status as a badge and an optional wake-lock toggle switch.
frontend/src/components/SerialTypeCounte: Displays a grid of print-count cards for each configured prefix mapping, sourcing counts from the diagnostics store and label settings.
frontend/src/components/SoundEffectsSett: Settings UI for configuring sound effects (success, error, printComplete) with per-event sound selection, volume control, file upload for custom sounds, and test playback.
frontend/src/config/lockScreenConfig.ts: Exports a helper that returns the lock-screen password, defaulting to 'swh1400' but overridable via the VITE_LOCK_PASSWORD build-time environment variable.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated), initializes access control, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity context and provider that manages AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and exposes identity state and status flags to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for submitting print jobs, fetching print history, and incrementing print counts, with backend availability tracking and IC error formatting.
frontend/src/hooks/useWakeLock.ts: React hook that manages the Screen Wake Lock API, persisting the user's preference in localStorage and re-requesting the lock when the page becomes visible again.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining a dark warehouse-themed design system with CSS custom properties for colors, a blue accent primary, and minimum 44px touch targets for tablet use.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and an Internet Identity authentication provider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/printing/barcodePreview.ts: Generates a deterministic SVG barcode image from a serial string by encoding characters as bit patterns and rendering them as SVG rects, with configurable bar width.
frontend/src/printing/cpclBarcodeDiagnos: Provides validation and diagnostic logging utilities for CPCL barcode generation, checking for empty data, invalid characters, out-of-bounds positions, and unreasonable heights.
frontend/src/printing/cpclBarcodeMapping: Maps UI barcode type strings (e.g., CODE128, EAN13) to their CPCL printer tokens and recommended width/ratio settings, with a Code 128 fallback for unknown types.
frontend/src/printing/cpclGenerator.ts: Generates CPCL printer command strings for label print jobs by converting mm-based label settings and serial data to dot-unit coordinates, barcode commands, and text layout with validation.
frontend/src/printing/cpclLayoutAdjustme: Provides utilities to clamp barcode X positions within safe printable bounds and estimate CODE128 barcode widths in dots to prevent label edge clipping.
frontend/src/printing/LabelPreview.tsx: React component that renders a pixel-accurate visual preview of a two-barcode label using computed mm-to-px conversions and SVG barcode data URLs from label settings.
frontend/src/printing/previewUnits.ts: Defines shared unit conversion constants and functions (mm, dots, px) for consistent preview rendering and CPCL printer output at 203 DPI.
frontend/src/screens/LockScreen.tsx: Renders a password entry screen that gates access to the app, using the PasswordSessionProvider's unlock function with error feedback and auto-focus.
frontend/src/screens/PasswordSessionWiri: Displays a static error screen when the password session system is misconfigured, offering the user a page refresh option.
frontend/src/services/printerService.ts: Zustand store managing USB printer state (connect, disconnect, auto-reconnect, print) by delegating to the USB CPCL transport layer and logging all events.
frontend/src/services/usbCpclTransport.t: WebUSB transport layer that handles device discovery, opening, endpoint detection, data transfer, and persistence of the last connected printer identifier.
frontend/src/state/backendAvailabilitySt: Zustand store tracking whether the backend is reachable, with actions to mark it available, stopped (with error), or reset.
frontend/src/state/diagnosticsStore.ts: Persisted Zustand store that tracks cumulative scan, print, and error counts globally and per label type/prefix combination.
frontend/src/state/labelSettingsStore.ts: Persisted Zustand store holding label layout settings (dimensions, barcode parameters, positions, prefix mappings) with versioned migration support.
frontend/src/state/logStore.ts: Zustand store with persistence for application logs (info/warn/error), capped at 1000 entries. Exports a standalone `addLog` function and a `useLogs` hook for reading logs.
frontend/src/state/printHistoryStore.ts: Zustand store with persistence for print history entries, capped at 1000 records. Exports `addPrintHistory` for adding entries and a `usePrintHistory` hook that includes a `reprint` function to re-send a past CPCL job.
frontend/src/state/useLabelSettingsHydra: React hook that tracks whether the label settings Zustand store has finished rehydrating from localStorage, returning a boolean `hasHydrated` flag.
frontend/src/tabs/DevicesTab.tsx: UI tab for managing USB printer connections, displaying connection status and providing connect, disconnect, and test-print actions with WebUSB support detection.
frontend/src/tabs/DiagnosticsTab.tsx: UI tab with three sub-tabs showing runtime statistics (scans, prints, errors), print history with reprint capability, and a filterable log viewer.
frontend/src/tabs/LabelSettingsTab.tsx: UI tab for configuring label and barcode settings, managing prefix-to-label-type mappings, and importing/exporting settings as JSON, with live validation feedback.
frontend/src/tabs/ScanPrintTab.tsx: Main scan-and-print workflow tab that guides the user through a two-barcode scan sequence, validates serials, generates CPCL, sends the print job, and records history and diagnostics.
frontend/src/utils/barcodeSettingsValida: Validation utility that checks label and barcode settings (dimensions, positions, spacing) and returns a structured list of field-level errors. Also exports a helper to retrieve a single field's error message.
frontend/src/utils/icErrors.ts: Provides utilities for detecting and formatting Internet Computer errors, specifically IC0508 'canister is stopped' errors, with user-friendly message extraction.
frontend/src/utils/labelSettingsErrors.t: Parses label settings update errors and returns user-friendly messages, handling canister stopped, authorization, network, and other known error types.
frontend/src/utils/labelSettingsImportEx: Handles JSON export and import of LabelSettings with BigInt serialization support and migration/backfilling of missing fields from defaults.
frontend/src/utils/labelTypes.ts: Defines built-in label types and utilities for extracting custom types from prefix mappings, generating display names, and merging all available label types.
frontend/src/utils/scanPrintErrors.ts: Formats Scan & Print specific errors (backend submission and printer errors) into concise user-facing strings, and identifies non-blocking backend failures.
frontend/src/utils/serialNormalization.t: Normalizes scanned serial numbers by trimming whitespace and removing common barcode scanner suffix characters (CR, LF, Tab).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and hash cleanup support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks project state including version, architectural notes, existing features, and new feature requests for a barcode/label printing app. Contains pending and completed feature IDs with summaries and requirement references.
